nodes.name: Melidectes
nodes.summary: Melidectes（Melidectes）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联6种鸟类，如Ornate melidectes、Cinnamon-browed melidectes、Vogelkop melidectes等6种鸟类。

nodes.name: Vogelkop melidectes
nodes.summary: The Vogelkop melidectes (Melidectes leucostephes) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is endemic to West Papua, Indonesia : northern Doberai and western Bomberai peninsula. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forest. References
nodes.shortSummary: The Vogelkop melidectes (Melidectes leucostephes) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is endemic to West Papua, Indonesia :…
